headline: Fifth Third (FITB) Wins Euromoney Best Bank Award In The United States
summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (NYSE:FITB) has been named the United States’ Best Bank by Euromoney for 2026. This is the first time Fifth Third has received this award, highlighting its performance, client service, and long-term impact. The recognition comes as Fifth Third continues to grow as one of the largest and more diversified banks in the country. This award puts Fifth Third in the spotlight at a time when large regional banks are competing hard for deposits, fee income, and digital...
